title: LagCleanerX
body:
![LagCleanerX description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f46776e87f7d5c1f3a799a6a8d8eae28b9582712.png)
Advertisement:

Text version LagCleanerX - The Ultimate Server Performance Solution LagCleanerX is a powerful, lightweight Minecraft server plugin designed to eliminate lag and maintain optimal server performance without disrupting gameplay. Whether you're running a small survival server for friends or managing a large network with hundreds of players, our plugin provides the tools you need to keep your server running smoothly. Key Features 🚀 Entity Management The plugin strategically removes lag-causing entities including dropped items, monsters, and particles at configurable intervals. Unlike other performance plugins, LagCleanerX allows you to exclude specific monster types from cleanup, ensuring your server's unique gameplay elements remain untouched. ⏱️ Customizable Automatic Cleaning Set it and forget it! The automatic cleaning system runs in the background at your specified intervals (default: 300 seconds), quietly maintaining server performance without administrator intervention. The timing is fully adjustable to suit your server's specific needs. ⚠️ Player-Friendly Warnings LagCleanerX respects your players' experience by providing customizable countdown warnings before each cleanup. Players receive alerts at configurable intervals (default: 30, 10, and 3 seconds) giving them time to pick up important dropped items before cleanup happens. 🛠️ Simple Command Interface Server administrators can easily manage LagCleanerX with intuitive commands: /lagclear - Manually trigger a cleanup /lagclear reload - Reload the configuration /lagclear toggle - Enable or disable automatic cleaning without editing config files 🔒 Easy Permissions The plugin features a comprehensive permissions system allowing server owners to delegate specific plugin functions to staff members while maintaining control over critical settings. ⚙️ Highly Configurable Every aspect of this plugin can be customized through the config: Enable/disable specific entity cleanup types Set custom cleanup intervals Configure warning messages and timing Create exclusion lists for important entity types Why Choose this plugin instead of other? 💯 Performance-Focused Design Our plugin was built from the ground up with performance in mind. The plugin operates efficiently without adding additional strain on your server. 🔄 Compatible With most popular server types: Compatible with: Paper / Bukkit / Spigot all from 1.20 - 1.21.5 👥 Player Experience Comes First Unlike other cleanup plugins that can delete all items with no warning, our plugin prioritizes player experience with its warning system and configurable exclusions, ensuring important gameplay elements are preserved. 📊 Informative Operation The plugin keeps administrators informed with detailed cleanup reports and clear status messages, so you always know exactly what's happening on your server. 🔍 Actively Maintained LagCleanerX is regularly updated to ensure compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions and to implement new features based on community feedback.
